chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit 2231 of 2018 ________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For final arguments. 02.09.2020 Barrister Zameer Hussain Ghumro, Advocate for plaintiff. Mr. Asim Iqbal, Advocate for defendants. Agha Faisal, J. Learned counsel for defendants submits that while promotion cannot be claimed as a vested right, however, there is no cavil to the proposition that an employee may be considered for promotion in accordance with the law, applicable rules and policy of the entity and that as soon as the relevant applicable promotion cycle starts, the plaintiff will be considered in accordance with the applicable law, rules and policy. Learned counsel for the plaintiff submits, upon instructions, that the plaintiff would be satisfied and not press this suit further if the present proceedings may be disposed of in terms of the representation of the defendants’ counsel stipulated supra. Learned counsel also places on record and relies upon an order dated 18.10.2019 in Suit 763 of 2019 (Muhammad Arif Latif vs. Federation of Pakistan & Another) to demonstrate that the present proceedings may be disposed of on the basis of the representation of the defendants. In the circumstances, by consent, this suit stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Farooq ps/*
